title: Apply Red-Orange Mixed Gradient Theme Across Entire UI + Visible Panel Links Section

requirements.text: Apply a red and orange mixed gradient theme consistently across the entire frontend UI — including all headers, sidebars, navigation bars, buttons (primary and secondary), backgrounds, cards, badges, tabs, modals, and hover/active states — for both the User panel (/) and Admin panel (/admin). Use a cohesive palette of deep reds (#DC2626, #B91C1C), vibrant oranges (#EA580C, #F97316), and red-orange gradients (e.g., from-red-600 to-orange-500). Replace any existing blue, purple, or neutral accent colors with this red-orange scheme.

quotes: pura ui panel me karo mix color red or orenge ka
पूरे UI में Red & Orange mixed gradient theme (buttons, headers, sidebar, backgrounds, hover effects सब)

acceptanceCriteria: All primary buttons display a red-to-orange gradient background
Header and navigation bar use red-orange gradient styling
Sidebar (admin panel) uses the red-orange color scheme
Card components, badges, and tabs reflect the red-orange theme
Hover and active states deepen to darker red tones
No blue or purple accent colors remain in either panel
Both User panel (/) and Admin panel (/admin) consistently use the new theme

requirements.text: Add a clearly visible 'Panel Links' section on the home page (HomePage.tsx) that displays direct clickable links to both panels: User Panel at the root URL (/) and Admin Panel at /admin. This section should be styled with the red-orange theme, use recognizable icons or labels, and make it easy for visitors to navigate to either panel.

quotes: Admin panel का URL — deploy होने के बाद दोनों panel के links clearly दिखाए जाएं
दोनों के links clearly visible section में दिखाए जाएंगे

acceptanceCriteria: HomePage displays a dedicated section with links to both User Panel (/) and Admin Panel (/admin)
Both links are clearly labeled and visually distinct
Section is styled with the red-orange gradient theme
Links are clickable and navigate to the correct routes

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui
Do not change backend logic or data models
Admin panel must remain accessible at the /admin route
User panel must remain accessible at the / route
nonGoals: Adding new features or pages beyond the theme change and links section
Changing authentication logic or backend APIs
Modifying font families or typography settings
